eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City; Elko; Douglas; Churchill; Clark, NV; at 1:17 PM on FEB 1, 2019 Effective until 2:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
